name: accordion-03
title: Accordion 03
description: Style variant of accordion: flat divided list with an icon slot per item and swap-on-open chevrons. Same vanilla JS behaviour (single/multiple, grid-rows animation), fully self-contained.

files.content: --- import { cn } from "../../lib/utils"; interface Props { title: string; /** Render this item expanded on load. */ open?: boolean; class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; /** Highlights the text and border with the theme's primary accent color when open */ highlight?: boolean; } const { title, open = false, class: className, highlight = false, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---
